c1.descriptionRaw: While <color=#FFD780FF>Sweeping Time</color> and <color=#FFD780FF>Breastplate</color> are both in effect, the chance of Breastplate's healing effects activating is increased to 100%.
c1.name: I Got Your Back

c2.descriptionRaw: Decreases the Stamina Consumption of Noelle's Charged Attacks by 20% and increases her Charged Attack DMG by 15%.
c2.name: Combat Maid

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Breastplate</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: Invulnerable Maid

c4.descriptionRaw: When <color=#FFD780FF>Breastplate</color>'s duration expires or it is destroyed by DMG, it will deal 400% of Noelle's ATK as <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG</color> to surrounding opponents.
c4.name: To Be Cleaned

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Sweeping Time</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: Favonius Sweeper Master

c6.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Sweeping Time</color> increases Noelle's ATK by an additional 50% of her DEF.
Additionally, every opponent defeated during the skill's duration adds 1s to the duration, up to 10s.
c6.name: Must Be Spotless

profile.description: A maid who faithfully serves the Knights of Favonius. She dreams of joining their ranks someday.
profile.name: Noelle
profile.title: Chivalric Blossom

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 4 consecutive strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Drains Stamina over time to perform continuous spinning attacks against all nearby opponents.
At the end of the sequence, performs a more powerful slash. 

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Favonius Bladework - Maid

combat2.descriptionRaw: Summons protective stone armor, dealing Geo DMG to surrounding opponents and creating a shield. The shield's DMG Absorption scales based on Noelle's DEF. The shield has the following properties: ·When Noelle's Normal and Charged Attacks hit a target, they have a certain chance to regenerate HP for all characters. ·Possesses 150% DMG Absorption efficiency against all Elemental and Physical DMG. The amount of HP healed when regeneration is triggered scales based on Noelle's DEF. Noelle is both a dutiful maid and a valiant knight.
combat2.name: Breastplate

combat3.descriptionRaw: Gathering the strength of stone around her weapon, Noelle strikes the opponents surrounding her within a large AoE, dealing Geo DMG. Afterwards, Noelle gains the following effects: ·Larger attack AoE. ·Converts attack DMG to Geo DMG that cannot be overridden by any other elemental infusion. ·Increased ATK that scales based on her DEF. Sometimes, it's not just dust that needs sweeping...
combat3.name: Sweeping Time

passive1.descriptionRaw:
When Noelle is in the party but not on the field, this ability triggers automatically when your active character's HP falls below 30%:
Creates a shield for your active character that lasts for 20s and absorbs DMG equal to 400% of Noelle's DEF.
The shield has a 150% DMG Absorption effectiveness against all Elemental and Physical DMG.
This effect can only occur once every 60s.
passive1.name: Devotion

passive2.descriptionRaw:
Noelle will decrease the CD of <color=#FFD780FF>Breastplate</color> by 1s for every 4 Normal or Charged Attack hits she scores on opponents.
One hit may be counted every 0.1s.
passive2.name: Nice and Clean

passive3.descriptionRaw: When a Perfect Cooking is achieved on a DEF-boosting dish, Noelle has a 12% chance to obtain double the product.
passive3.name: Maid's Knighthood
